mvw.mvw_command: cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DSIMDJSON_DEVELOPER_MODE=ON && cmake --build build -j48 && ctest --test-dir build -j48 --output-on-failure
mvw.input_scale: official developer workflow with SIMDJSON_DEVELOPER_MODE=ON; full ctest suite (119 tests) in parallel
mvw.success_criteria: build exit code 0 and ctest report '100% tests passed, 0 tests failed out of 119'

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak via monitor_tree.sh (captures multi-thread/multi-process aggregate peak); workload actually executed

static_triage.notes: C++ SIMD JSON parser; developer mode compiles many test/example targets and executes full test suite.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build very high (parallel compilation), run high (parallel ctest)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 16 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 11.7679 GB, run 7.4040 GB, disk 0.2939 GB.
